name: Idle Spinner Factory Builder
author: Poki
description: Idle Spinner Factory Builder is a satisfying simulator where you run a factory packed with wild, mad-science machines! Spin the first cog to create coins, watch them roll along tracks, and let other machines boost their value with clicks, pumps, engines, portals, and more. Upgrade steam engines, conveyor belts, field generators, zeppelins, and tons of crazy contraptions as you grow into the ultimate tycoon. With spinning cogs, clinky-clanky sounds, sparks flying at high speed, and endlessly satisfying visuals, every moment feels rewarding. Ready to spin, upgrade, and build the craziest factory ever? How to play Idle Spinner Factory Builder? Click or tap to play! Spin the cog to create coins. Who created Idle Spinner Factory Builder? Idle Spinner Factory Builder is created by Airapport. Play their other games on Poki: , Farm and Mine and The Third Piglet's Tower ! How can I play Idle Spinner Factory Builder for free? You can play Idle Spinner Factory Builder for free on Poki. Can I play Idle Spinner Factory Builder on mobile devices and desktop? Idle Spinner Factory Builder can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
